film.title: Big Stan
film.overview: A weak con man panics when he learns he's going to prison for fraud. He hires a mysterious martial arts guru who helps transform him into a martial arts expert who can fight off inmates who want to hurt or love him.

dialogues.dialogue: And you know what? I'm glad you brought it up.  Seriously.  Otherwise, I might have done something that I'd be ashamed of later.  And that would be to sell you that timeshare.  - You would not feel safe there. - No, I wouldn't.
dialogues.cause_raw: attempting to sell an unsafe property

dialogues.dialogue: It means you're one bad m**********r.  So you rape people?  Well, now that's something I'm not real proud of.  I don't condone the practise, to be honest. But I do it some.  Just to keep up with the Joneses. You know what I mean.
I grind into my morning coffee.  That's how I feel too. Listen, I gotta go.  Make me proud, Stan.  Come on, baby! Do it to me!  - Oh, yeah! - Are you using me?
